examples: One of these men may have been the murderer.
Murderer Walter Kemmler was the first man to die in the electric chair.
The conviction of their son's murderer helped to give them a sense of closure.
Because this question remains unresolved, the confessed murderer remains alive in San Quentin prison.
Mr Tsvangirai is probably not a murderer, but he is clearly guilty of carelessness.
